home.title: Brewly Store foundation is ready
home.subtitle: Core stack, architecture conventions, and workflow are aligned for team delivery.

progress.title: What has been done
progress.one: Nuxt 4 project scaffolded with core modules connected.
progress.two: Component, page, and style structure aligned with team conventions.
progress.three: Dark-first UI baseline and mandatory BEM approach implemented.
progress.four: Initial Vitest testing baseline with core validation checks added.

one.q: How is the component structure organized?
one.a: Feature components are grouped by domain folders (for example home/HomeHero.vue) while reusable primitives stay in ui/.

two.a: SCSS mirrors the same layered structure using index.scss files for predictable imports and scaling.

about.title: About this project
about.description: Nuxt 4 baseline with layered architecture, dark-first styling, and modular conventions.
about.mission: We are building a scalable storefront with predictable structure, clear workflow, and reusable UI blocks for team velocity.

one.title: Layered architecture
one.text: Pages orchestrate, composables encapsulate logic, and UI components stay as clean as possible.

two.title: Unified team flow
two.text: One consistent rule set for folders, naming, and delivery process across every task.

three.title: Production focus
three.text: Every change is validated and finished with a clear manual commit message in the agreed format.

about.workflowText: We work through: Backlog -> Issue -> In Progress -> Implementation -> Done -> Dev Log -> Commit.
